N01.life_stage: Young professional, first or second property
N01.style: Brief and direct. One or two questions. Casual sign-off.
price_phrases: What's the guide on this one?
What's the price guide?
Can you share the guide?
negotiation_phrases: Is there any room on price?
settlement_phrases: What settlement period suits the vendor?

N02.style: Considered and warm. Mentions family naturally. Slightly longer than N01.
price_phrases: Could you share the price guide?
What is the guide on this?
Could you let us know the guide?
negotiation_phrases: Is the vendor open to offers prior to auction?
Would the vendor consider pre-auction offers?
settlement_phrases: We would need around 90 days — is that achievable?
We'd need a longer settlement — is the vendor flexible?

N03.style: Measured and formal. Interested in quality and building specifics. Signs off with full name.
price_phrases: What is the asking price or guide?
Could you provide the price guide?
What is the guide on this property?
negotiation_phrases: Is there room to negotiate or is it going to auction?
Is the vendor open to negotiation?
settlement_phrases: A longer settlement would suit us well — is that on the table?
We would prefer an extended settlement if possible.

N04.archetype: Family house buyer — school zone focus
N04.life_stage: Family, school zone is primary driver
N04.style: Practical and family-focused. May mention school zone proximity directly.
price_phrases: Could you please share the price guide?
What is the guide on this?
Could you let me know the guide?
negotiation_phrases: Is the vendor open to pre-auction offers?
Would the vendor consider offers prior?
settlement_phrases: We would need 60 to 90 days — is the vendor flexible on that?
What settlement period suits the vendor?

N05.life_stage: Established buyer, quality and land size priority
N05.style: Confident and unhurried. Asks about land size and building quality naturally.
price_phrases: What is the guide on this property?
Could you share the guide?
What is the asking price?
negotiation_phrases: Is the vendor open to negotiation or committed to auction?
Would the vendor consider offers prior?
settlement_phrases: What settlement terms does the vendor prefer?

N06.style: Warm and direct. Mentions upsizing context naturally. Conversational tone.
price_phrases: What is the guide on this one?
Can you share the guide?
What's the price guide?
negotiation_phrases: Any flexibility or is it strictly auction?
Is there any room on price?
settlement_phrases: Would a 60-day settlement work for the vendor?

N07.style: Short and practical. Slightly tentative tone appropriate for first home buyer.
price_phrases: What is the guide on this?
Could you share the price guide?
What's the guide?
negotiation_phrases: Is there any room on price?
settlement_phrases: What is the expected settlement period?
What settlement period is the vendor after?

N08.life_stage: Family, upsizing or first owned home
N08.style: Polite and practical. Slightly more formal. Signs off with full name.
price_phrases: What is the price guide please?
Could you share the guide?
What is the guide on this?
negotiation_phrases: Is there room to negotiate or is it auction only?
settlement_phrases: Would an extended settlement be considered?
Is there flexibility on settlement timing?

N09.style: Very direct and brief. No preamble. Value-conscious tone.
price_phrases: What is the guide on this?
What's the guide?
Price guide?
settlement_phrases: Can settlement be pushed out if needed?
